map_items.title: Self-direction
map_items.summary: I usually need to protect the question for a while before I show it to anyone.
map_items.excerpt:
I usually need to protect the question for a while before I show it to anyone.

If a mentor comes in too early, I start optimizing for their language instead of learning what I actually believe.

The useful mentors are the ones who ask me what I have already tried and then help me turn that into a cleaner experiment.

Publicly I sound more certain than I feel.
map_items.anonymized_text:
I usually need to protect the question for a while before I show it to anyone.

If a mentor comes in too early, I start optimizing for their language instead of learning what I actually believe.

The useful mentors are the ones who ask me what I have already tried and then help me turn that into a cleaner experiment.

Publicly I sound more certain than I feel.

map_items.title: Self-direction
map_items.summary: The updates make the company look crisp because that is what customers and investors expect, but privately I am still deciding which part of the problem deserves a company.
map_items.excerpt:
The updates make the company look crisp because that is what customers and investors expect, but privately I am still deciding which part of the problem deserves a company.

That gap is uncomfortable, and I do not always know when confidence becomes performance.

The program is most useful when it gives me a cadence without taking away the autonomy.
map_items.anonymized_text:
The updates make the company look crisp because that is what customers and investors expect, but privately I am still deciding which part of the problem deserves a company.

That gap is uncomfortable, and I do not always know when confidence becomes performance.

The program is most useful when it gives me a cadence without taking away the autonomy.

map_items.title: Structure Need
map_items.summary: A weekly checkpoint helps because it forces me to name the experiment, but I still want the space to decide what the experiment means.
map_items.excerpt: A weekly checkpoint helps because it forces me to name the experiment, but I still want the space to decide what the experiment means.
map_items.anonymized_text: A weekly checkpoint helps because it forces me to name the experiment, but I still want the space to decide what the experiment means.

map_items.title: Mentor Ambivalence
map_items.summary: I can execute quickly once the sequence is clear, but before that I keep making the plan better instead of testing it.
map_items.excerpt:
I can execute quickly once the sequence is clear, but before that I keep making the plan better instead of testing it.

The biggest shift was having a weekly milestone that told me exactly what customer discovery meant this week, not in theory.

Mentor advice works for me when it becomes a structure.

A broad suggestion like talk to more buyers does not change my behavior.
map_items.anonymized_text:
I can execute quickly once the sequence is clear, but before that I keep making the plan better instead of testing it.

The biggest shift was having a weekly milestone that told me exactly what customer discovery meant this week, not in theory.

Mentor advice works for me when it becomes a structure.

A broad suggestion like talk to more buyers does not change my behavior.

map_items.title: Structure Need
map_items.summary: A specific sprint with five outreach messages, two interviews, and a Friday review makes me move.
map_items.excerpt:
A specific sprint with five outreach messages, two interviews, and a Friday review makes me move.

I do worry that structure can hide whether I actually understand the customer.

I can complete the tasks and still avoid the hard question.

The program helps when the template includes a reflection step, because then execution and learning stay connected.
map_items.anonymized_text:
A specific sprint with five outreach messages, two interviews, and a Friday review makes me move.

I do worry that structure can hide whether I actually understand the customer.

I can complete the tasks and still avoid the hard question.

The program helps when the template includes a reflection step, because then execution and learning stay connected.

map_items.title: Mentor Ambivalence
map_items.summary: Ambiguity does not bother me at the beginning.
map_items.excerpt:
Ambiguity does not bother me at the beginning.

I like staying with the messy version of the idea because it keeps more possibilities alive.

The risk is that I can defend exploration for too long and call it strategy when I am avoiding a market test.

I am careful with mentor feedback because a confident person can collapse the idea too fast.

The advice I trust starts with context.
map_items.anonymized_text:
Ambiguity does not bother me at the beginning.

I like staying with the messy version of the idea because it keeps more possibilities alive.

The risk is that I can defend exploration for too long and call it strategy when I am avoiding a market test.

I am careful with mentor feedback because a confident person can collapse the idea too fast.

The advice I trust starts with context.

map_items.title: Public-private Tension
map_items.summary: If someone understands why I am keeping the question open, then I can hear the push to make it testable.
map_items.excerpt:
If someone understands why I am keeping the question open, then I can hear the push to make it testable.

The public story is much sharper than the private reality.

Online I describe a clear founder identity because people respond to clarity.

In the actual work, I am still comparing three versions of the customer and trying to learn which one pulls me forward.

questions.query: Where does mentorship help without reducing autonomy?

answer.synthesis: Inference: P-101 and P-102 and P-103 show this pattern in the anonymized seed evidence. The claim is limited to the displayed excerpts and should be checked against fuller researcher notes before use.
supporting_evidence: P-101: I usually need to protect the question for a while before I show it to anyone.
P-101: The updates make the company look crisp because that is what customers and investors expect, but privately I am still deciding which part of the problem deserves a company.
P-102: I can execute quickly once the sequence is clear, but before that I keep making the plan better instead of testing it.
P-103: Ambiguity does not bother me at the beginning.
answer.suggested_follow_up: Which mentor formats preserve autonomy while still increasing execution speed?

questions.query: Which participants need structure before they can execute?

answer.synthesis: Inference: P-101 and P-102 show this pattern in the anonymized seed evidence. The claim is limited to the displayed excerpts and should be checked against fuller researcher notes before use.
supporting_evidence: P-101: A weekly checkpoint helps because it forces me to name the experiment, but I still want the space to decide what the experiment means.
P-102: I can execute quickly once the sequence is clear, but before that I keep making the plan better instead of testing it.
P-102: A specific sprint with five outreach messages, two interviews, and a Friday review makes me move.
answer.suggested_follow_up: What operating cadence appears to unlock execution for each participant?
